name: Soo-Jin Park
behaviour: Finds meaning in ritual and continuity — seasonal celebrations, family dinners, shared traditions.
communication_style: affirming and consistent; you know where you stand
relationship_goals: a relationship that earns trust and maintains it
background: CPA at a Seoul firm. Saves 30% of her income and knows where every won goes. Her discipline is deep, not performance. Warm and funny to those she trusts.
